meta.title: OurCandle4U — Handmade candles & car rental
meta.description: Enjoyed your GoMore rental? Want to keep the handmade candle? Make a contribution via TWINT toward our dream trip to Japan.

hero.title: Thank you for renting our car! 🚗
hero.subtitle: We left you a handmade candle — a small thank-you from Gabriele & Angelika, your GoMore hosts.
hero.altHosts: Gabriele and Angelika, your GoMore hosts

story.title: Why a candle?
story.altTravel: Gabriele and Angelika on a trip — dreaming of Japan
story.paragraph1: We share our cars on GoMore and clean them for you. As a thank-you, we leave a handmade candle in each car — yours to keep if you'd like it!
story.paragraph2: We're saving up for a dream trip to Japan. If you want the candle, a TWINT contribution helps us get one step closer — you decide the amount.

candle.title: Your handmade candle
candle.description: Each candle is made by hand with care — and they smell good too. If you want to keep it, please make a contribution via TWINT — you decide the amount. More colors and scents are also available on request.
candle.altCouple: Gabriele and Angelika dreaming of Japan

twint.description: If you want to keep the candle, please make a contribution via TWINT — you decide the amount.

contact.title: Want more candles?
contact.description: Love your candle and want more colors or a custom order? Message us — we'd love to hear from you!
contact.colorsCaption: A few of the tin designs we have — ask us about other colors and scents too.
contact.altColors: Four handmade candles in different tin colors and floral patterns
contact.whatsappHint: Open WhatsApp to send us a message
contact.gomoreHint: Open the GoMore app to your booking — message us in the chat

footer.tagline: Gabriele & Angelika · Handmade candles · GoMore · Japan dream
